HomeNews
About 14,200,000 results

TypeScript Tutorial: Learn TypeScript in 30 Minutes
A beginner-friendly walkthrough of TypeScript's type system, covering interfaces, generics, and union types with practical examples.

Handbook — TypeScript
The official TypeScript handbook. Every chapter is short and focused, with runnable examples in the playground.

TypeScript for JavaScript Programmers
A guide that maps each TypeScript feature back to the JavaScript you already know. Skip the basics, focus on what's new.

Understanding TypeScript Type Utilities
A tour of Partial, Required, Pick, Omit, Record, and the conditional types that compose them.

Effective TypeScript: 62 Specific Ways to Improve Your TypeScript
Book notes summarizing the most impactful items from Effective TypeScript, with examples drawn from real codebases.

Total TypeScript: The Beginner's TypeScript Tutorial
An interactive tutorial that walks through building a small app, adding types incrementally as the code grows.

TypeScript Generics, Explained
A deep dive into generics with analogies that finally make the angle-bracket syntax click for JavaScript refugees.

Advanced TypeScript Patterns for Library Authors
Template literal types, mapped types, and recursive conditional types — the patterns that ship in mature libraries.
